CREATE TABLE test_random_string (id UInt32, random_string String);
CREATE TABLE test_nested (id UInt32, random_string String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_nested SELECT id, randomStringUTF8(5) FROM numbers(10);
SELECT id, random_string FROM test_nested WHERE id < 5;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT random_string FROM test_nested WHERE id > 5) AS subquery;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_random_string WHERE length(random_string) = 1;
CREATE TABLE join_example (id UInt32, join_string String);
INSERT INTO join_example SELECT id, randomStringUTF8(3) FROM numbers(5);
SELECT a.id, a.random_string, b.join_string FROM test_random_string AS a JOIN join_example AS b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT count(*), any(random_string) AS random_string_sample FROM test_random_string GROUP BY id;
